_publications._publicationTitle: FT895 Impairs Mitochondrial Function in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Cells.

_contextSnippet: Our experiment revealed a decrease in PINK1 and Parkin protein levels in S462TY, STS26T, T265, and STS8814 cells following FT895 treatment
details: Decrease in PINK1 and Parkin protein levels following FT895 treatment
